name: Mobile Machinery Excise Tax Refund

eligibility.description: The vehicle must meet specific design-based tests for mobile carriage and a use-based test of under 7,500 highway miles per year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a refund of gasoline excise taxes for vehicles with permanently mounted machinery (like cranes or drills) that travel less than 7,500 miles on public highways annually.
